screen_rationale: Metadata identified floral polymorphism, pollinating and florivorous insects, and fitness implications. The listed OUP route did not provide full text, and no eligible DataCite, Dryad, or Zenodo package was recovered. This is an M0 access conclusion only; no trait roles or effects are inferred from metadata.

OpenAlex metadata reports experimental floral damage plus early-season floral anthocyanin and condensed-tannin measurements associated with several floral antagonism outcomes. The article is a B-path screening lead only: full text/data must establish a direct flower-specific barrier role, eligible outcome denominator, and recoverable effect uncertainty before any registry entry.
